setup.title: 🐺 WEREWOLF 🐺
setup.role_reveal_intro: Each player will now privately learn their role.

night.intro_sleep: The village falls into an uneasy sleep...
night.intro_shadows: Dark forces stir in the shadows.
night.closing: ☽ The night draws to a close...
night.wolves_chosen: The pack has chosen... {name} will be hunted.
night.wolves_convert_skip: The Alpha Wolf has chosen to convert — no kill tonight.

day.intro_gather: The survivors gather in the square, eyes hollow with fear.
day.no_deaths: 🏡 A miracle! No one died last night. The village sighs with relief.
day.discussion_prompt:
Discuss among yourselves. Who do you suspect?
  (In a real game, players would now talk openly for several minutes.)
day.discussion_pause: (Press Enter when discussion is over and you're ready to vote...)
day.no_votes_cast: No votes cast. The village fails to reach a decision.
day.vote_tie:
It's a tie between: {names}.
  No execution today — the village is divided.
day.condemned: ⚖️ The village has spoken. {name} is condemned with {count} vote(s).
day.vote_header: ☀️ VILLAGE VOTE — Choose someone to eliminate (or 0 to abstain):

game_over.village_wins: 🎉 The VILLAGE wins! The werewolves have been vanquished!
game_over.werewolf_wins: 🐺 The WEREWOLVES win! They have devoured the village!

actions.conversion_private:
You have been bitten by the Alpha Wolf! You are now a WEREWOLF.
  Work with the pack to devour the village.

death.lover_dies:
💔 {lover_name} cannot bear the loss of their beloved {name}...
  They die of a broken heart.
death.lovers_linked: 💘 {name1} and {name2} are now bound by love.

Villager.name: Villager
Villager.description: A humble townsfolk. No special power — but every vote counts.

Seer.name: Seer
Seer.description: Each night, peer into someone's soul and learn their true allegiance.

Doctor.name: Doctor
Doctor.description: Each night, protect one player from death. May protect themselves once.

Bodyguard.name: Bodyguard
Bodyguard.description: Protect a player at night — but if attacked, the Bodyguard dies instead.

Hunter.name: Hunter
Hunter.description: When eliminated (day or night), may drag one player to the grave.
Hunter.death_intro: 🏹 The Hunter [{player_name}] has fallen! They take one last shot...
Hunter.death_result: {target_name} is struck by the Hunter's dying arrow!

Witch.name: Witch
Witch.description: Holds one healing potion and one poison potion. Each may be used once.
Witch.prompt_heal: [WITCH] The werewolves attacked {victim_name}. Use your healing potion to save them?
Witch.prompt_poison_ask: [WITCH] Do you wish to use your poison potion?

Cupid.name: Cupid
Cupid.description: On Night 1, links two lovers. If one dies, the other dies of heartbreak.
Cupid.prompt_intro: [CUPID] {player_name}, choose two players to fall in love!

Werewolf.name: Werewolf
Werewolf.description: Every night, the pack chooses one villager to devour.
Werewolf.prompt_kill: Werewolves, choose your victim for tonight:

Alpha Wolf.name: Alpha Wolf
Alpha Wolf.description: Once per game, convert a Villager into a Werewolf instead of killing them.
Alpha Wolf.prompt_convert_ask: [ALPHA WOLF] Do you wish to use your conversion power instead of killing tonight?
Alpha Wolf.prompt_convert_target: [ALPHA WOLF] Choose a Villager to convert to the pack:

Minion.name: Minion
Minion.description: A human servant of the wolves. Knows the wolves; wolves don't know them.

Serial Killer.name: Serial Killer
Serial Killer.description: Kills one player each night. Wins by being the last one standing.

Jester.name: Jester
Jester.description: Wants to be lynched by the village. If eliminated by vote, the Jester wins!
Jester.win_message: 🃏 {player_name} was the Jester! They fooled the village and WIN!

tts.roles_distributed: The roles have been distributed. The village prepares for its first night.
tts.night_start: The village falls asleep… Eyes closed, everyone.
tts.seer_wake: Seer, open your eyes. Choose a player to investigate.
tts.wolf_wake: Werewolves, open your eyes. Choose your victim silently.
tts.day_start_death: The village wakes up. {name} was found dead. They were a {role}.
tts.day_start_no_death: The village wakes up. Miraculously, no one died last night.
tts.vote_start: The village must vote to eliminate a suspect.
tts.vote_tie: It's a tie! The village cannot reach a decision.
tts.wolves_win: The werewolves win! The village has fallen.
tts.villagers_win: The village wins! All werewolves are dead.
